title: Tiled
description: Adds customizable and craftable Tile Blocks!
body: ### Have you ever wanted to build custom tiled floors? How about making compact gradients between blocks, or creating your own murals/wallpapers/paintings in a vanilla friendly way? With Tiled, you can! Tiled adds optimized and customizable Tile Blocks and Small Tile Blocks to the game! The Tile Blocks have 4 tiles, while the Small Tile Blocks have 16 tiles, allowing for endless creative possibilities! ## Tile Blocks Tile Blocks can be crafted with any combination of concrete blocks placed in a 2x2 square. In total you can make 65536 different Tile Blocks! ## Small Tile Blocks Small Tile Blocks can be crafted with any combination of concrete blocks placed in a 4x4 square! In total you can make over 18 quintillion different Small Tile Blocks! ## Tiling Table But how do you get the 4x4 crafting you ask? Well, that's where the Tiling Table comes in! This new workstation allows you to create both Small Tile Blocks and regular Tile Blocks actually and even has its own inventory, so you don't lose your tile layout when you close the UI! The Tiling Table is crafted with 2 polished andesite, an iron ingot, and ANY concrete block! Also, a solid color Tile Block or Small Tile Block can replace a concrete block of that color in Tile Block and Small Tile Block crafting recipes! I hope you all enjoy the mod and the builds you can make with these new blocks! My other stuff: [https://linktr.ee/proctoredgames](https://linktr.ee/proctoredgames)
